text: "Sew cushions."... That is, by making people easy in their sins, and promising them impunity.—They gave life to their souls. That is, they flattered them with promises of life, peace, and security.
"Violated me."... That is, dishonored and discredited me.—To kill souls. That is, to sentence souls to death, which are not to die; and to promise life to them who are not to live.
